name: David McGinnis, CPA, P.C.
description: Provides expert forensic accounting services in the Pacific Northwest and across the US, helping businesses and individuals follow the money with straightforward financial analysis.

name: Forensic Accounting Services
description: Oregon's first CPA firm devoted exclusively to forensic accounting engagements, providing expert financial analysis and damage calculations for attorneys, insurance adjusters, and individuals in civil and criminal cases nationwide.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: 95% of this success was because of you. What you demonstrated in judgment, instincts, and ability to communicate is unreal.
Your involvement and calculations doubled [the defendant's] initial offer.
Mr. Parker has consistently exhibited a level of expertise and professionalism which commands the respect of litigants, attorneys, and courts.
Your testimony was compelling, well-documented, and well thought out. The jury was obviously impressed.

sentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly positive reputation across 25+ testimonials with consistent praise for expert analysis, persuasive testimony, and measurable impact on case outcomes and settlements.

name: Geffen Mesher
description: Premier Pacific Northwest firm offering Forensic & Integrity Services with Certified Fraud Examiners, helping businesses prevent fraud, embezzlement, and strengthen internal controls across various industries.

name: Jessica Sands, CPA, LLC
description: Forensic accounting consulting services by Jessica Sands, CPA licensed in Oregon with Core Forensic Accounting Certificate, specializing in family law, divorce, financial analysis, fraud investigation, and business damages.

name: Morones Analytics
description: Forensic accounting firm specializing in accounting investigations for financial malfeasance, fraud including employee embezzlement, business valuations with financial reconstruction, and court testimony.

name: Thomas Roney LLC
description: Firm employing Gregson Parker, CPA, founder of Oregon’s first dedicated forensic accounting firm, specializing in damages calculation, lost earnings/profits, fraud, embezzlement, and expert testimony in courts across multiple states.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: He is very experienced and qualified, and he gives excellent testimony in depositions and trials.
Your expert opinions and reports were pivotal to our success in this case.
Your work was very helpful, and very easy to present to (the other side).
I look forward to using you in the future.

sentiment.summary: Highly experienced expert witness with consistently excellent testimony, valued for professional expertise and instrumental case outcomes across multiple attorney testimonials.
